category_sources: source_facts.description says Syft is a CLI for generating Software Bill of Materials from container images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo and source_facts.homepage identify the official anchore/syft project.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its wiki and README are official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions SBOM generation from container images; source_facts.executables lists syft as the CLI.
